title: DegToRad Method, Spel Class
syntax: Function DegToRad (degrees As Double) As Double
parameters: degrees	The number of Degrees to convert into Radians.
see_also:
RadToDeg

DegToRad Example

VB Example:

Dim rad As Double

rad = m_spel.DegToRad(45)

C# Example:

double rad;

rad = m_spel.DegToRad(45);
examples:
Dim rad As Double

rad = m_spel.DegToRad(45)
